spec.query:
from(bucket: "anarion")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "sensor.lazienka_dol_temperatura")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value" )
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["domain"] == "sensor")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] == "lazienka_dol_temperatura")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["source"] == "HA")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")
spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  DATE_BIN($__interval, time) AS time,
  LAST_VALUE(value) AS value,
  'Temperatura Łazienka Dół ' AS field
FROM "sensor.lazienka_dol_temperatura"
WHERE
  "domain" = 'sensor'
  AND "entity_id" = 'lazienka_dol_temperatura'
  AND "source" = 'HA'
  AND "time" >= $__timeFrom
  AND "time" <= $__timeTo
GROUP BY DATE_BIN($__interval, time)
ORDER BY time

spec.query:
from(bucket: "anarion")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "binary_sensor.grzanie_gabinet" or r["_measurement"] == "binary_sensor.grzanie_garaz" or r["_measurement"] == "binary_sensor.grzanie_hania" or r["_measurement"] == "binary_sensor.grzanie_kotlownia" or r["_measurement"] == "binary_sensor.grzanie_lazienka" or r["_measurement"] == "binary_sensor.grzanie_lazienka_dol" or r["_measurement"] == "binary_sensor.grzanie_piwnica" or r["_measurement"] == "binary_sensor.grzanie_salon" or r["_measurement"] == "binary_sensor.grzanie_schowek" or r["_measurement"] == "binary_sensor.grzanie_sypialnia" or r["_measurement"] == "binary_sensor.grzanie_wejscie" or r["_measurement"] == "binary_sensor.grzanie_wodomierz" or r["_measurement"] == "binary_sensor.grzanie_wojtek")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["domain"] == "binary_sensor")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")
  |> fill(usePrevious: true)
spec.rawSql:
SELECT DATE_BIN($__interval, time) AS time, AVG(value) AS value, friendly_name AS field FROM "binary_sensor.grzanie_gabinet" WHERE "time" >= $__timeFrom AND "time" <= $__timeTo GROUP BY DATE_BIN($__interval, time), friendly_name
UNION ALL
SELECT DATE_BIN($__interval, time) AS time, AVG(value) AS value, friendly_name AS field FROM "binary_sensor.grzanie_garaz" WHERE "time" >= $__timeFrom AND "time" <= $__timeTo GROUP BY DATE_BIN($__interval, time), friendly_name
UNION ALL
SELECT DATE_BIN($__interval, time) AS time, AVG(value) AS value, friendly_name AS field FROM "binary_sensor.grzanie_hania" WHERE "time" >= $__timeFrom AND "time" <= $__timeTo GROUP BY DATE_BIN($__interval, time), friendly_name
UNION ALL

spec.query:
from(bucket: "anarion")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "binary_sensor.grzanie_gabinet" or r["_measurement"] == "binary_sensor.grzanie_garaz" or r["_measurement"] == "binary_sensor.grzanie_hania" or r["_measurement"] == "binary_sensor.grzanie_kotlownia" or r["_measurement"] == "binary_sensor.grzanie_lazienka" or r["_measurement"] == "binary_sensor.grzanie_lazienka_dol" or r["_measurement"] == "binary_sensor.grzanie_piwnica" or r["_measurement"] == "binary_sensor.grzanie_salon" or r["_measurement"] == "binary_sensor.grzanie_schowek" or r["_measurement"] == "binary_sensor.grzanie_sypialnia" or r["_measurement"] == "binary_sensor.grzanie_wejscie" or r["_measurement"] == "binary_sensor.grzanie_wodomierz" or r["_measurement"] == "binary_sensor.grzanie_wojtek")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["domain"] == "binary_sensor")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["friendly_name"] == "Grzanie Gabinet" or r["friendly_name"] == "Grzanie Garaż" or r["friendly_name"] == "Grzanie Hania" or r["friendly_name"] == "Grzanie Kotłownia" or r["friendly_name"] == "Grzanie Piwnica" or r["friendly_name"] == "Grzanie Salon" or r["friendly_name"] == "Grzanie Schowek" or r["friendly_name"] == "Grzanie Sypialnia" or r["friendly_name"] == "Grzanie Wejście" or r["friendly_name"] == "Grzanie Wodomierz" or r["friendly_name"] == "Grzanie Wojtek" or r["friendly_name"] == "Grzanie Łazienka" or r["friendly_name"] == "Grzanie Łazienka Dół")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_value:r._value, _time:r._time, _field:r.friendly_name}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

  'Pralka' AS field
FROM "sensor.pralka_power"
WHERE
  "domain" = 'sensor'
  AND "entity_id" = 'pralka_power'
  AND "source" = 'HA'
  AND "time" >= $__timeFrom
  AND "time" <= $__timeTo
GROUP BY DATE_BIN($__interval, time)
ORDER BY time
